channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.gematsu.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: The Verge: Microsoft weighing Arkane Studios closure, Marvel’s Blade cancelation
item.content:encoded:
• Xbox

Way of layoffs reported to begin on July 6.

Xbox plans to announce a wave of layoffs leading to studio closures, spinoffs, potential mergers, and canceled games next week, according to a The Verge report citing sources familiar with Xbox parent company Microsoft’s plans.

Microsoft is reportedly weighing the closure of at least five studios, including Marvel’s Blade developer Arkane Studios, which operates under the Bethesda Softworks banner. However, the company is also exploring options to sell the studio. Microsoft also wants to cancel Marvel’s Blade, the report claims. The game was originally planned to launch later in 2026, but slipped to late 2027 and is running over budget.

As reported by Bloomberg last week, Microsoft is also said to be trying to spin off Compulsion Games, Double Fine Productions, and Ninja Theory. GamesBeat also reported this week that Microsoft is seeking a buyer for State of Decay 3 developer Undead Labs.

Compulsion Games is reportedly already convinced the studio will close and has begun telling employees to seek work elsewhere. Ninja Theory employees were also informed earlier this month that Microsoft wants to close or spin off the studio.

The wave of layoffs—planned to begin on July 6, according to The Verge’s sources—could result in at least 1,000 job losses if Microsoft closes studios, or at least 500 before the wider cuts.



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/the-verge-microsoft-weighing-arkane-studios-closure-marvels-blade-cancelation
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: The Last Hour of an Epic TO THE MOON RPG debut trailer, new screenshots
item.content:encoded:
Freebird Games has released the debut trailer and new screenshots for The Last Hour of an Epic TO THE MOON RPG, a turn-based RPG depiction of the To the Moon series first announced in November 2023.

Here is an overview of the game, via its Steam page:

About

Ever wondered what To the Moon series would be like if it were an actual turn-based RPG?

Well, here it is anyway.

For just fans of the RPG genre and fans of the To the Moon series alike, load up a save file that’s already gone through the first 99 hours of grinding, and play (only) The Last Hour of an Epic TO THE MOON RPG straight to its conclusion!

Join the already decked out party of Neil, Eva, Roxie, and Rob as they venture the final Lighthouse-shaped Dungeon to defeat the mysterious mastermind big bad boss that await them at the top!

Solve puzzles and defeat the mid-bosses of each section through majestic turn-based combat, using dazzling battle skills like…

IT HAS THE JUICE! (Eva)

ILLUSIONARY BLADE! (Rob)

TAKE IT TO THE FACE! (Neil)

. . . and MAGICAL KITTY GATTTLING GUN! (Roxie)

Featuring all major characters from the To the Moon series, as they fall under the curse of the enigmatic big baddie atop the tower.

What adventure awaits in their last hour? Who awaits them at the top?! And just why does this game even exist!?

Only YOU can help us not regret spending time on this!

The Last Hour of an Epic TO THE MOON RPG is due out for PC via Steam in 2027.

Watch the trailer below. View a new set of screenshots at the gallery.

Debut Trailer

Screenshots

  • ❮
  • ❯


https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/the-last-hour-of-an-epic-to-the-moon-rpg-debut-trailer-new-screenshots
